name: Mushrooms in Garlic Oil
recipeInstructions:
1. In a saucepot over moderate flame, combine olive oil, white wine, lemon juice and zest, bay leaves, parsley, garlic, red pepper flakes, black peppercorns, and salt.
2. Bring mixture to boil, then reduce heat and simmer for 15 minutes.
3. Strain through cheesecloth-lined fine chinois into a clean saucepot over moderate flame.
4. Add mushrooms and bring back to boil. Reduce heat and simmer for an additional 5 minutes.
5. Remove from heat and allow mixture to cool in the saucepan.
6. Cover and chill in the refrigerator until ready to serve.
7. Drain well before serving slightly chilled.
